scope.in_scope: All contracts under src/ on the pinned commit
out_of_scope_categories: Upstream protocol failures (Morpho, Centrifuge, Pareto, Superstate, USDC, Chainlink)
Direct Morpho donations / repayments impacting share inflation (unless accepted mitigations bypassed)
Async settlement delays, partial fills, queued cancellations
Withdrawal vs burn privilege differences, residual dust, last-shareholder edge cases

selected_hypotheses: H1-prime: share-inflation via external Morpho collateral donation bypassing accepted mitigations
H3-prime: Request pull/repay/authorizeMinting path exceeding accepted Facilitator/Consumer trust
H4-prime: rounding and proportional-distribution edge cases leaving LTV above safe LTV without bad-debt precondition
H5-prime: async fund state machine impact reachable by non-operator users under non-delayed conditions
H7-prime: proxy/beacon storage collision or role escalation not relying on admin malfeasance
H8-prime: reentrancy or callback abuse via onMorphoRepay/preLiquidate
notes: Audit baseline chainsecurity commit is not reachable in the shallow 50-commit clone; the repo stores the full PDFs which are the authoritative reference.
Selection of guarded invariants matches the strong patterns in the Project: virtual-share offset, request min/max balance, syncRepaidStatus, EIP-712 digests, restricted TransferGuard.
